summary: Kept the reserving-class tree view from jumping to the top after hiding or unhiding paths.
details: The tree picker now preserves its expanded path list and scroll offset when it rebuilds after a hide/unhide action.
Hide/unhide refreshes now prepare the replacement tree before swapping it into view, reducing visible refresh flicker.
Single-node hide actions now remove the hidden node in place with a short collapse animation instead of rebuilding the whole tree.
The tree toolbar now includes an eye button next to Filter that opens the same live-updating Hidden Paths window as the right-click menu.
The reserving-class tree now shows collapsible Favorite and All Paths sections, supports favorite nicknames and custom favorite folders, and lets users drag favorites into or out of folders.
New favorites now display the full raw path until renamed, then show only the custom favorite name.
Favorite folders now use the same folder icon styling as the project picker.
Favorite rows now include the source value-type icon, source level label, and a slashed-star remove-from-favorite button.
Favorite and favorite-folder rename now uses an inline editor instead of a modal prompt.
Tree refresh replacement now paints the refreshed picker before removing the previous picker to reduce flicker when unhiding paths.
